name: LinkedIn Outreach MCP
description: LinkedIn content generation toolkit for sales teams and recruiters. Generates personalized connection requests, InMails, posts, comments, and multi-touch outreach sequences. Does NOT scrape or automate LinkedIn -- it's a content assistant that helps humans write better messages. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_connection_request
tools.description: Generate a personalized LinkedIn connection request (max 300 characters).

tools.name: generate_inmessage
tools.description: Generate a professional LinkedIn InMail or direct message.

tools.name: generate_post
tools.description: Generate an engaging LinkedIn post with hashtags.

tools.name: analyze_profile
tools.description: Analyze a LinkedIn profile description to extract actionable outreach insights.

tools.name: generate_outreach_sequence
tools.description: Generate a 5-touch LinkedIn outreach sequence with timing recommendations.

tools.name: generate_comment
tools.description: Generate an insightful comment for a LinkedIn post.
